name: First Shift — Trial, Error, and Too Much Sugar
description: Your first day! Kit guides you through making simple drinks and snacks.

customerOrders.dialogue: Just a simple coffee, please. Strong.
Something sweet and warm? Like a hug in a cup!
I need energy… but gentle energy. Do you have matcha?
Do you have anything to eat? I’m so hungry…
Ah, a classic. Black coffee, nothing fancy.
Something light? I’m running on fumes.
A latte would be lovely. With honey if you have it!
Banana shake, please! Just finished my run.
Vanilla latte… extra sweet today, I deserve it.
Hot chocolate? It’s been a twelve-hour shift…
Egg sandwich. Big. I’m starving.
Cheapest thing with cheese? That’ll do.
Can I have the pink drink? Pleeeease?
Something cold, thanks. Been walking all morning.
Ironic, right? A baker ordering pancakes. I just want a break.
A cookie, dear. Just one. With honey.
Coffee. Fast. Three more stops.
Matcha latte… and could you make it look pretty?
Yo, banana shake! Gotta refuel.
A muffin would be perfect. Blueberry, if you have it?

name: Afternoon Rush — 3:07 PM
description: School’s out! The student crowd floods in. Keep up!

customerOrders.dialogue: Strawberry milk!! Pretty please!
Something cold. Surprise me.
We need fuel. Coffee. Now.
Ooh… is that strawberry cake? I’ll take it!
Um… c-can I have something warm…?
Cherry soda! Quick! I have practice!
A small snack would be nice. Something with honey?
A caramel mocha, darling. Extra dramatic.
Blueberry smoothie. Brain fuel for ranked matches.
Cinnamon roll? We just finished rehearsal.
Lemonade! Something refreshing after the game.
Matcha frappe… it matches my sketchbook cover!
Grilled cheese to share! We’re starving!
Apple cider. Did you know apples float because they’re 25% air?
Banana bread! My reward after practice.
Vanilla pudding, please. Today was… exhausting.
Two cherry sodas… wait, we only have money for one.
Strawberry milk and a quiet corner, please.
Coffee. Strong. We have regionals tomorrow.
Is this place any good? I’ll try the honey latte.

name: A Quiet Evening — A Scared and Hungry Boy
description: The cafe is quiet. A small boy in a dirty school uniform slips inside…

customerOrders.dialogue: The usual, please.
Matcha latte… it’s been a long day.
Can we share a chocolate banana?
…t-thank you…
I heard you have matcha cake? I’d love a slice.
…this is… really good…
Cream cocoa. I’ll be up all night anyway.
Chai latte, please… I’m waiting for my daughter’s call.
Lemon and honey tea. Good for the throat… and the soul.
Rice porridge. Something warm. It’s cold out there.
…can I have… more of this…?
Apple pie for two. Our anniversary, actually.
Hot chocolate. I just want to forget the ER tonight.
Tomato soup… and could I get a little milk for the cat outside?
Your special cocoa… the one that sparkles?
Coffee. Black. Long night ahead.
…I never… had pudding before…
Mushroom soup, please. I missed dinner studying.
…thank you… for everything…
